name: South Side Compton Crips
description: The South Side Compton Crips (SSCC) formed in the 1970s in the area west of Long Beach Boulevard in Compton — the only unclaimed territory at the time. They are notorious for the 1996 murder of Tupac Shakur: member Orlando Anderson shot Tupac after being beaten by the Death Row Records entourage at the MGM Grand. Anderson was killed in 1998 in a gunfight with Corner Poccet Crips. In 2023, Duane 'Keefe D' Davis was arrested for the Tupac murder. In 2003, SSCC members killed Yetunde Price, half-sister of Venus and Serena Williams, while defending a crack house.

sources.title: Team South Side Compton Crips — StreetGangs
